name: TabsRoot
description: Root controller for tabbed navigation. Supports keyboard navigation with arrow keys.
whenToUse: Switching between panels of related content in the same view.
avoidWhen: Page-level navigation - use links/router. Sequential steps - use a wizard.
accessibilityRequirements: Arrow keys navigate tabs. Home/End jump to first/last tab. Tab panels are linked via aria-controls.

parts.name: TabsList
parts.description: Container for TabsTrigger buttons. Handles keyboard navigation.

loop.description: Whether keyboard navigation loops from last to first tab.

parts.name: TabsTrigger
parts.description: Button that activates a tab panel.

value.description: Matches the TabsContent value to activate.

parts.name: TabsContent
parts.whenToUse: Always inside a TabsRoot, paired with a TabsTrigger by value.

examples.title: Usage
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; tabValue = (el.value ?? tabValue); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; tabValue = (el.value ?? tabValue); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; tabValue = (el.value ?? tabValue); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; tabValue = (el.value ?? tabValue); }}> Overview Features Settings Disabled

Overview panel content. Use arrow keys to navigate between tabs.

Features panel content.

Settings panel content.

examples.title: Uncontrolled with defaultValue
examples.code:
{ const el = e.currentTarget as any; uncontrolledTabValue = (el.value ?? uncontrolledTabValue); }} onchange={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; uncontrolledTabValue = (el.value ?? uncontrolledTabValue); }} onclick={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; uncontrolledTabValue = (el.value ?? uncontrolledTabValue); }} ontoggle={(e) => { const el = e.currentTarget as any; uncontrolledTabValue = (el.value ?? uncontrolledTabValue); }} defaultValue="tab1"> Tab 1 Tab 2 Tab 3

First tab content. Loop is disabled - arrow keys stop at first/last tab.

Second tab content.

Third tab content.

examples.title: Feature Flag
examples.code: Tabs machine can be toggled with featureFlags.tabsMachine.
